channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: CAB3 Power Grab: Mnangagwa Rewards Loyalist to Consolidate Military Control ?
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| President Emmerson Mnangagwa has elevated Brigadier General Fidelis Mhonda to Major General, a move critics say is the... Continue reading "CAB3 Power Grab: Mnangagwa Rewards Loyalist to Consolidate Military Control ?" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: ZC Board confirms national team appointments, selection panels @ZimCricketv
item.description: Zimbabwe Cricket (ZC) has thrown its full backing behind the coaching structure that guided Zimbabwe to the Super Eight stage of this year’s ICC Men’s T20 World Cup, with the Board retaining Head Coach Justin Sammons and his technical team while approving key appointments across the men’s high-performance pathway. Meeting in Harare on 23 [...] The post ZC Board confirms national team appointments, selection panels appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Zimbabwe rout Bangladesh to record biggest-ever Test win
item.description: Zimbabwe produced a clinical all-round display to record their biggest Test victory in history, crushing Bangladesh by an innings and 85 runs on the third afternoon of the one-off Test at Harare Sports Club on Tuesday. After building a commanding first-innings lead of 270, the hosts dismissed Bangladesh for 185 in their second innings to [...] The post Zimbabwe rout Bangladesh to record biggest-ever Test win appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Harare to Host Chibuku Neshamwari Traditional Dance Festival National Finals as 10 Provincial Champions Compete for Top Prize
item.description: Zimbabwe’s premier celebration of traditional dance and cultural heritage will reach its climax on August 1, when the country’s top provincial dance groups converge at Harare Gardens for the 2026 Chibuku Neshamwari Traditional Dance Festival National Finals. After nearly three months of provincial competitions that began on May 9, ten champion groups representing Zimbabwe’s [...] The post Harare to Host Chibuku Neshamwari Traditional Dance Festival National Finals as 10 Provincial Champions Compete for Top Prize appeared first on ZIMBUZZ. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbuzz

item.title: Auxillia Mnangagwa In “Secret” Meeting With Russian Diplomat As CAB3 Storm Intensifies
item.description: Tinashe Sambiri| As Zimbabwe remains gripped by growing controversy over the Constitution of Zimbabwe Amendment (No. 3) Bill (CAB3), First... Continue reading "Auxillia Mnangagwa In “Secret” Meeting With Russian Diplomat As CAB3 Storm Intensifies" (via Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Wicknell Chivayo Gifts ZANU PF Chief Whip Pupurai Togarepi New Toyota Fortuner, US$100K for Birthday @wicknellchivayo @ZANUPF_Official
item.description: Wicknell Chivayo Gifts ZANU PF Chief Whip Pupurai Togarepi New Toyota Fortuner, US$100K for Birthday Businessman Wicknell Chivayo has once again made headlines after announcing a lavish birthday gift for ZANU PF Chief Whip Pupurai Togarepi, comprising a brand-new 2026 Toyota Fortuner GD6 and US$100,000 in cash. Chivayo revealed the surprise in a lengthy Facebook [...] The post Wicknell Chivayo Gifts ZANU PF Chief Whip Pupurai Togarepi New Toyota Fortuner, US$100K for Birthday appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Zimbabwe remembers Dr Joshua Nkomo 27 years after his passing @bulawayo24
item.description: CHIBWECHITEDZA, Mafukufuku, Umdala Wethu and Father Zimbabwe are some of the fondly referred to him. 27 years after his passing, the nation remembers the late Vice President Dr Joshua Mqabuko Nyongolo... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: China tightens grip on Zimbabwe lithium @bulawayo24
item.description: Chinese investors now control more than 80% of Zimbabwe’s lithium production, cementing Beijing’s dominance over one of the country’s most strategic mineral sectors even as a global price slump expose... (via Bulawayo24 News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews

item.title: Veteran ConCourt Lawyer Prof Loemore Madhuku reveals way forward as CAB 3 goes to President Mnangagwa
item.description: Inside the Legal Labyrinth of Zimbabwe’s Constitutional Amendment Bill No. 3 HARARE — In the dimly lit corridors of Zimbabwe’s Parliament, a legislative storm has reached its zenith, leaving the nation’s democratic foundations trembling. On a Tuesday (30 June 2026) that many legal experts are already calling a “dark day for constitutionalism,” the National Assembly [...] The post Veteran ConCourt Lawyer Prof Loemore Madhuku reveals way forward as CAB 3 goes to President Mnangagwa first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Quiet Money, Deep Roots: How the Oak Foundation Backs Zimbabwe’s Communities
item.description: The Geneva-based Oak Foundation has funded Zimbabwean causes since 1983. In 2025 its Zimbabwe programme made USD 7.9 million in grants, backing palliative care, landmine clearance, regenerative farming and care for children who have lost parents. #Zimbabwe #Policy #ZimbabwePolicy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tapiwa Hillary Phillipo
